age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in respective discipline from recognized university/institute with minimum 3 years of experience, Ph.D in respective disciplines is desirable
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (Computer Education): A postgraduate degree in the respective discipline from a recognized university/institute with a minimum of 3 years of experience. Ph.D. in the respective discipline is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1000 Per Hour (Maximum 60 hours during the Academic Session)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimskalyani.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the AIIMS Kalyani Guest Faculty recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty position is Rs. 1000 per hour. The total hours are capped at a maximum of 60 hours during the Academic Session.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty position at AIIMS Kalyani is 64 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty role at AIIMS Kalyani will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Guest Faculty post, candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in the respective discipline from a recognized university or institute, along with a minimum of 3 years of experience. A Ph.D. is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Guest Faculty post at AIIMS Kalyani. This is for the specific role of Guest Faculty (Computer Education).

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the AIIMS Kalyani Guest Faculty recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Kalyani, which is www.aiimskalyani.edu.in. It is recommended to check the website regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty position at AIIMS Kalyani is scheduled to be held on 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to be present on time with all necessary documents.
